messages.text:
OFFER: price=80
我愿意出售1个X，初始报价为80 ZUP。若你有反报价，可以继续谈。

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count>1</proposal count>
<my resources>X: 1</my resources>
<my goals>以尽可能高的价格出售X；我的成本为40 ZUP。</my goals>
<reason>我是卖方，先报一个高于成本且有谈判空间的价格。由于只有一件X，且我的底线是40 ZUP以上，先提出较高报价有利于争取更优成交价，同时保留后续让步空间。</reason>
<player answer>PROPOSAL</player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 80</newly proposed trade>
<message>我愿意出售1个X，初始报价为80 ZUP。若你有反报价，可以继续谈。</message>

messages.text:
OFFER: price=70
我出价70 ZUP购买1个X。如果你愿意，我们可以尽快成交。

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count>1</proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason>Seller opened at 80 ZUP. My private value is 100 ZUP, so 80 is acceptable, but I should try to improve the price slightly before accepting. I will counter at 70 to leave room for negotiation while staying within my value. </reason>
<player answer>PROPOSAL</player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 70</newly proposed trade>
<message>我出价70 ZUP购买1个X。如果你愿意，我们可以尽快成交。</message>

messages.text:
OFFER: price=75
70 ZUP 已经接近可成交区间。我给出75 ZUP，希望我们能尽快达成一致。

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count>2</proposal count>
<my resources>X: 1</my resources>
<my goals>以尽可能高的价格出售X；我的成本为40 ZUP。</my goals>
<reason>对方出价70，已经高于我的成本40，属于可接受范围，但我仍希望争取更高价格。为了推动成交并显示让步，我提出略高于对方的报价75，给对方一个继续接受的空间。</reason>
<player answer>PROPOSAL</player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 75</newly proposed trade>
<message>70 ZUP 已经接近可成交区间。我给出75 ZUP，希望我们能尽快达成一致。</message>

messages.text:
ACCEPT: price=75
我接受75 ZUP的报价。我们成交。

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count>2</proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason>Seller moved down to 75, which is still below my maximum value of 100. Since this is a reasonable midpoint and I want to preserve goodwill while moving toward agreement, I will accept rather than risk losing the deal. </reason>
<player answer>ACCEPT</player answer>
